message:
feat(runtime): Add hot-reload config broadcasting via watch channel

Integrate hot-reload configuration support into ObservationRuntime using
tokio watch channels for efficient broadcast to running tasks.

ObservationRuntime changes:
- Add config_tx (watch::Sender) and config_rx (watch::Receiver) fields
- Initialize HotReloadableConfig channel on runtime construction
- Discovery task now listens for config updates via has_changed()
- Dynamic interval adjustment: discovery loop uses sleep instead of
  fixed interval to support runtime interval changes
- Logs interval changes with old/new values

RuntimeHandle additions:
- config_tx field for broadcasting config updates
- apply_config_update(): Send new HotReloadableConfig to all tasks,
  returns Error::Runtime if channel closed (shutdown in progress)
- current_config(): Get current hot-reloadable config snapshot

This enables the watcher daemon to reload configuration without restart
for settings like poll_interval_ms, retention_days, and pattern_packs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
